attr.title: TPlayer
attr.desc: "A lightweight and stylish MP3 player built with Love2D, featuring dynamic background colors based on album artwork, smooth transitions, gamepad support, volume control, and a clean console-friendly interface."
attr.desc_md: *"A lightweight and stylish MP3 player built with Love2D, featuring dynamic background colors based on album artwork, smooth transitions, gamepad support, volume control, and a clean console-friendly interface."
attr.inst: Install and copy MP3 into gui/music
attr.inst_md: Install and copy your MP3 into gui/music
